emails.subject: Addis
emails.body: Don't know if you saw it, but your friend and mine Paul Addis is leaving AEP to "pursue other interests".

emails.subject: RE: Addis
emails.body: RE: Addis is that the same as "personal reasons" To: Whalley, Greg

emails.subject: RE: Addis
emails.body: RE: Addis I think it relates to Paul not getting the top job in their soon to be spun off unregulated unit. That job went to some guy named Shockley who Eric Vanderwald will report to. Their press release makes for fun reading.
